scope: Deployment command issue plan persistence, advisor, Battle Command compliance display, and queue congestion policy

verified.notes: TypeScript and Vite production build completed successfully after adding CommandIssuePlan to campaign, deployment, plan-set, battle state, command congestion, save normalization, and UI surfaces.

DeploymentScreen passes commandIssuePlan through deployment save, battle start, plan-set save/overwrite, and plan-set apply paths. createBattleState copies the saved plan into BattleState. BattleCommandScreen reads BattleState.commandIssuePlan for the queue summary.
commandCongestionReport keeps standard queue behavior, caps effective command count for split_batches, and adds a strict_direct penalty when multiple commands are batched under direct handling.

DeploymentScreen derives command issue advice from expected batch size, command/organization doctrine capacity, and command-post fatigue. It recommends standard_queue, split_batches, or strict_direct and exposes a one-click adoption path through the existing save function.

BattleCommandScreen derives a live compliance line from queued command count, commandIssuePlan, and commandCongestionReport. It distinguishes waiting, compliant, split-batch handling, congestion warning, and strict-direct violations before batch issue.

notVerified.notes: The in-app browser rejected localhost navigation/control for http://127.0.0.1:5173/ because of the browser URL policy. No browser workaround was attempted.
Mobile/cellphone QA is currently excluded from the active target.

expectedManualFlow: Verify the left deployment ledger shows 伝令運用 標準発令 / 4件単位.
Verify the 伝令運用 advisor shows a recommendation, risk label, and reasons such as 想定一括, 処理容量, and 過負荷 or 容量内.
If the recommendation differs from the saved plan, click 推奨運用を採用 and verify the selected plan updates and persists.
Switch 伝令運用 to 分割発令 and verify the ledger changes to 2件単位.
Start the mandatory battle and verify Battle Command 予約指揮 shows 分割発令 2件単位.
Verify Battle Command shows 方針待機 with an empty queue, 方針適合 or 分割適用 when queued commands match the saved policy, and 逐次違反 when multiple commands are queued under 逐次発令.
Queue five selected-brigade commands and verify 一括混線 is reduced compared with 標準発令 under the same command-post capacity.
Repeat with 逐次発令 and verify batching multiple commands creates the policy-violation delay reason.
